User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account for the HopeEngineer Hub website.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

registrationDate.description: Date and time the user registered.

lastLogin.description: Date and time of the user's last login.

title.description: The title of the blog post.

description.description: A short summary of the post.

imageUrl.description: URL for the post's main image.

content.description: The full HTML content of the blog post.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the post was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: postId
params.description: The unique identifier for the blog post.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure prioritizes authorization independence and clarity. User data is stored in a path-based structure under `/users/{userId}`. Blog posts are stored in a top-level `blogPosts` collection for easy public querying. Security rules will enforce that only admins can write to `blogPosts`, while all users can read them.
